basic_details.job_title: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur) Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website iimraipur.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen/EWS candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree with first-class marks and Master's degree with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute. Minimum three (03) years of relevant experience.
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute. Master's degree with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute. Minimum three (03) years of relevant experience in procurement/stores management/contract administration/inventory management/vendor management. Proficiency in MS Office applications is essential.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer

salary_details.details: Consolidated emoluments equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 6 (Basic Pay Rs. 35,400/- per month) plus Dearness Allowance and other allowances. The monthly salary will be Rs. 35,400 Per Month.

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Personal Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_raipur_ii: Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer
Bachelor's degree with first-class marks and Master's degree with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute. Minimum three (03) years of relevant experience.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Raipur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Vacancy Details 2026

rows.post_name: Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute. Master's degree with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute. Minimum three (03) years of relevant experience in procurement/stores management/contract administration/inventory management/vendor management. Proficiency in MS Office applications is essential.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen/EWS candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Consolidated emoluments equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 6 (Basic Pay Rs. 35,400/- per month) plus Dearness Allowance and other allowances. The monthly salary will be Rs. 35,400 Per Month.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Applications

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Written Test Skill Test Personal Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIM Raipur Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer recruitment is 19-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer post at IIM Raipur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree with first-class marks and a Master's degree with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum experience required?
faq.answer: A minimum of three (03) years of relevant experience in procurement, stores management, contract administration, inventory management, or vendor management is required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The consolidated emoluments will be equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 6, with a basic pay of Rs. 35,400/- per month, plus Dearness Allowance and other allowances.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Procurement and Contract Management Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Skill Test, Personal Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official IIM Raipur website.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification PDF and the online application form in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
